subject: Thank you for celebrating responsibly
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://email
body:
|

| | Peter,

We’ve been socially distancing ourselves for a long time and now that we’re in the holiday season, it is important we continue to do our part to flatten the curve.

Recently, cases have been increasing throughout the United States. While this news can feel scary, we need to continue to take necessary precautions to prevent the spread of the Coronavirus. The CDC has a detailed list of recommendations that everyone can follow to stay healthy.

[**_Click here for best practices on how you can protect your family and your health during this holiday season._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/22608313/265000426/1030256748?CDC_AA_refVal=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.cdc.gov%2Fcoronavirus%2F2019-ncov%2Fprepare%2Findex.html&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjM2Yzg3ZS0wNTNmLWViMTEtYTYwNy0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iLf1tjP5Qc4aAVVwQL7DJxvUsOhXTjjMJVrhD3ooX0U=&emci=012cc02b-043f-eb11-a607-00155d43c992&emdi=db36c87e-053f-eb11-a607-00155d43c992&ceid=2678920)

Know I will continue to work on this every day to ensure that we can all return to our normal lives. I’m in Washington, D.C. this week working to ensure we get a Coronavirus relief package signed into law to support our hospitals and help struggling families, workers and small businesses. There is also good news in that the first vaccine for the virus is being rolled out this week and millions of people could get it by the end of next month.

Please continue to stay home and practice social distancing. Your efforts will continue to save lives and I know we will get through this together. Thank you for celebrating the holidays responsibly!

Thank you,

Mike Thompson

subject: Yesterday's Vote
body:

Peter \-- **I have good and bad news...** The good news is that your calls and emails worked. Senate Republicans gave you the vote to End Walz' Emergency Powers yesterday. And to our surprise, six Democrats joined them in terminating Walz' powers. That shows momentum! The bad news is that the Resolution failed in a 62-63 vote in the Democrat controlled Minnesota House in the early morning hours today. And this vote happened after Republicans and Democrats passed the Walz' Shutdown bailout with your tax money.
## [SEE VOTES](https://www.action4liberty.com/republicans_and_democrats_pass_walz_shutdown_bailout_bill?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=yesterday_s_vote&n=2)
It's depressing watching the political class, uniparty continue to trample on our rights and spend recklessly. But fortunately for us, our civil disobedience strategy seems to be working. Our heroes Larvita and Jane still REFUSE to obey Governor Walz illegal and unconstitutional orders. Their strength and courage is paving a path for a mass disobedience tomorrow. **150 businesses will be reopening on Wednesday in defiance of Governor Walz. If we can't get the legislature to do the right thing in December, then 'We the People' can take matters in our own hands.** I know what you're thinking: give me the list of businesses participating in the mass disobedience. As you can imagine, the organizers don't want to make Keith Ellison's job easier. So check with your local restaurant and bar - ask them if they plan to open up in defiance of the Governor. We hope to completely undermine Governor Walz' authority. His tyrannical run is coming to an end. The next time the legislature shows up, a new batch of legislators take office. Liberty champions like Erik Mortensen won't rest until Governor Walz's Emergency Powers are GONE! **SIDE NOTE: Thank you to everyone who contributed to the[Jane Moss Legal Fund](https://www.action4liberty.com/jane_legal_fund?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=yesterday_s_vote&n=3) yesterday. We're already 60% of the goal in the first day. That's amazing!** Make sure to check [**action4liberty.com**](https://www.action4liberty.com?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=yesterday_s_vote&n=4) for the latest on our fight against Walz' Illegal Emergency Powers. We need to start building for January when the math is on our side, and we can finally End Walz' Emergency Powers once and for all! **In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty**

| | | | [](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=337A764A20A3528)

| | GEORGIA VOTER ELECTION INTEGRITY HOTLINE
GAValidatetheVote.org | 855-702-0702
---
| | As part of the most comprehensive ballot security effort in Georgia history, True the Vote has launched a Georgia Election Integrity Hotline to assist Georgia voters and volunteers during the critical Senate runoff elections. The hotline offers live, bilingual support 24 hours a day for Georgians who have questions or concerns, or who have witnessed election fraud, manipulation or illegal action taking place. Voters can fill out an online report available at [GAValidatetheVote.org](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cCUzQSUyRiUyRmdhdmFsaWRhdGV0aGV2b3RlLm9yZyUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=337A764A20A3547) or call the hotline at 855-702-0702. You can also submit pictures or videos from your cell phone or any other documentation or evidence. From there, our rapid response network is keeping track of these reports, and will respond, assist, and take action as necessary.

---
| | [ FILE A REPORT ](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZnZW9yZ2lhLWVsZWN0aW9uLWludGVncml0eS1ob3RsaW5lJTJG&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=337A764A20A3549)
---
| | The Georgia Election Integrity Hotline is just one important resource True the Vote will offer for Georgia voters, volunteers, and election workers who believe in ensuring the law is upheld throughout our election process. This week, we announced our [partnership with the Georgia Republican Party](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLXBhcnRuZXJzLXdpdGgtZ2VvcmdpYS1nb3AtdG8tZW5zdXJlLXRyYW5zcGFyZW50LXNlY3VyZS1iYWxsb3QtZWZmb3J0LWZvci1zZW5hdGUtcnVub2ZmLWVsZWN0aW9ucyUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=337A764A20A3548) and we are working around the clock to provide critical tools and trainings for Georgia voters as we head into the final days before the runoff elections. In addition to the hotline, we will assist with publicly available signature verification training, monitoring absentee ballot drop boxes, and other nonpartisan election integrity initiatives.

We are all citizen watchdogs and we are asking voters to join us as we focus our "Eyes On Georgia" in the most comprehensive ballot security initiative in Georgia history!
Feel free to share this resource with other Georgia voters. Right now, citizens like you are critical in defending the integrity of our elections and our country. Thank you for staying engaged!

Onward,

\- The True the Vote Team

From there, our rapid response network is keeping track of these reports, and will respond, assist, and take action as necessary. | | | | The Georgia Election Integrity Hotline is just one important resource True the Vote will offer for Georgia voters, volunteers, and election workers who believe in ensuring the law is upheld throughout our election process. This week, we announced our and we are working around the clock to provide critical tools and trainings for Georgia voters as we head into the final days before the runoff elections. In addition to the hotline, we will assist with publicly available signature verification training, monitoring absentee ballot drop boxes, and other nonpartisan election integrity initiatives. We are all citizen watchdogs and we are asking voters to join us as we focus our "Eyes On Georgia" in the most comprehensive ballot security initiative in Georgia history! Feel free to share this resource with other Georgia voters. Right now, citizens like you are critical in defending the integrity of our elections and our country. Thank you for staying engaged! name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Winter Storm Gail
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
As you may have heard, we are currently preparing for our first heavy snowfall of the season. A Winter Storm Warning has been issued for Providence and Kent Counties from 7 p.m. tomorrow through 1 p.m. Thursday, and we're expecting as much as a foot of snow. In order to ensure the safety of Rhode Islanders, all test scheduling has been temporarily paused on [portal.ri.gov](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BzpjsgEgA4zxiN6USHuxZqPhaSf_J3U9HIBRBYfEWi87UOW5a0MB_mMRcOr024Z9ULc1bftgN53YyQZYhYxSmj_KPixUGlmJFzZEPb9Vf34N9dFgCAZa9NeeLHrpU_jZ4CvlvUJmgEk=&c=JEHD-vGSqzrOSPV48sJZZm8KG0d60BZYF4iqFcVazGTkcBX66RABFQ==&ch=RDlEfqLdOT_iGsYmgfQHrGrCnIxTylw7E4MhiyUZ-JM9n_jlYX4YQQ==) for Thursday, 12/17.
Some outdoor sites may close, and some indoor or covered sites will stay open. If you have a test scheduled for Thursday, please watch local media closely to find out if your testing site will close. If your site is closed, you can come back at any time once it reopens and get tested. We'll post any test site closure alerts on the Rhode Island Department of Health's social media channels as soon as possible ([facebook.com/RIHealth](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BzpjsgEgA4zxiN6USHuxZqPhaSf_J3U9HIBRBYfEWi87UOW5a0MB_utlumIyYiheY0yJBvD54V7lLga7J_TxugFmo6KiAMkWvMypzrhUarIrtliA1OLw_PJ-SRKYQ8djBxVwoqrUiVMMci8U_jpl1Q==&c=JEHD-vGSqzrOSPV48sJZZm8KG0d60BZYF4iqFcVazGTkcBX66RABFQ==&ch=RDlEfqLdOT_iGsYmgfQHrGrCnIxTylw7E4MhiyUZ-JM9n_jlYX4YQQ==), [twitter.com/RIhealth](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BzpjsgEgA4zxiN6USHuxZqPhaSf_J3U9HIBRBYfEWi87UOW5a0MB_utlumIyYiheyBBQR6MX5bkt4kKZsAW4ddSq4Y8sTlaMeghlenhLdlR36ZByjSmtQNeLgDzv0kyB2uUL8qaovxK04Ne_stjV9g==&c=JEHD-vGSqzrOSPV48sJZZm8KG0d60BZYF4iqFcVazGTkcBX66RABFQ==&ch=RDlEfqLdOT_iGsYmgfQHrGrCnIxTylw7E4MhiyUZ-JM9n_jlYX4YQQ==)).
Please make sure that you and your family are prepared for this storm. Make sure you have supplies like nonperishable food, clean water, warm blankets, and extra sets of warm clothing for each person. If you or someone in your household has special needs, take some time to register now with the [RI Special Needs Emergency Registry (RISNER)](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BzpjsgEgA4zxiN6USHuxZqPhaSf_J3U9HIBRBYfEWi87UOW5a0MB_utlumIyYiheQcfRYmCXvC31lIVguQJEf5JHImDJm0BvMxqnwFeWFFWge5BcNOAaETfzWV30QLODv54Ey38RlCUw4U-dCTayFORgS0ELCXAs8BVCiF0NLuG3oQJt6cA3LprDVaUXKS7LdV2iRjlDw44=&c=JEHD-vGSqzrOSPV48sJZZm8KG0d60BZYF4iqFcVazGTkcBX66RABFQ==&ch=RDlEfqLdOT_iGsYmgfQHrGrCnIxTylw7E4MhiyUZ-JM9n_jlYX4YQQ==). RISNER lets police, fire, and other first responders in your community better prepare for and respond to your needs in an emergency.
We're working around the clock to ensure that the state is prepared for Winter Storm Gail and any emergency we face. To stay informed throughout the storm, visit [Rhode Island Emergency Management Agency](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BzpjsgEgA4zxiN6USHuxZqPhaSf_J3U9HIBRBYfEWi87UOW5a0MB_jOdyxUSRO8GB5QmerpAlOLzSBbe_l_DbwKbSc-wfB6UxUVwuwi4HpNAf-I1ppllFe19pJBeoWQyKgN9I554Ae7CJB_6tNrS7WOBIVUPSLHz&c=JEHD-vGSqzrOSPV48sJZZm8KG0d60BZYF4iqFcVazGTkcBX66RABFQ==&ch=RDlEfqLdOT_iGsYmgfQHrGrCnIxTylw7E4MhiyUZ-JM9n_jlYX4YQQ==) on Twitter.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BzpjsgEgA4zxiN6USHuxZqPhaSf_J3U9HIBRBYfEWi87UOW5a0MB_utlumIyYihegcKzqBoRXd_tx7biuqg1OAEKCDK1dh_aSZA4q0nUO6cs7idLA5dKZq6UVOVIOFfu-y3QvMnVZixPiBNRe269XsjYiv5QqTKU9dSU4RFrEkJhsibXJbWRFI6Wp8PPDrBPc8nOmlqeVQ4QkG5Cmt1LwkoeiOKjFENMj0dolEr-WOPazt9kUkvhgDBLo6Z6E7-eeLr-o57WhC4cRyVeZIFr9_06wlATZz3PWq7f0Uso6cFeLO7Qqu799OcSYvAlInWYENxXnHpxxic=&c=JEHD-vGSqzrOSPV48sJZZm8KG0d60BZYF4iqFcVazGTkcBX66RABFQ==&ch=RDlEfqLdOT_iGsYmgfQHrGrCnIxTylw7E4MhiyUZ-JM9n_jlYX4YQQ==).

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Take action for fair and legal elections!
body:
| | Contact Your Senators Today!
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=KehyLivU37hhQUP_4fpRjPNKVkwCf7H_HmcfYwwYtYM&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201215p2a01&n=1)
| Peter, _Do we have fair and legal elections in America?_ We should all want an honest answer to that question. It’s critical for the foundation and the future of our republic. Yet, serious unanswered questions persist about the November election process in states like Pennsylvania, Georgia, Michigan, and Arizona. We’re in the dark, and no one is turning on the light. **We believe the American people must demand that Congress hold a fair hearing to investigate the election integrity concerns and the issues raised through sworn affidavits made by American citizens.** In recent months and weeks, it has become clear that state executive officials will not conduct an audit and the courts are refusing to hear the concerns of over 18 states. And so, it is left up to us. We, the people must take a stand. [Use our easy tool to quickly contact your Senators today and urge them](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=KehyLivU37hhQUP_4fpRjPNKVkwCf7H_HmcfYwwYtYM&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201215p2a01&n=2), as your representatives, to hold a hearing. Please share this message with your friends and family. It is not only for this election that we must act but also to protect fair and legal elections in America for years to come. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=KehyLivU37hhQUP_4fpRjPNKVkwCf7H_HmcfYwwYtYM&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201215p2a01&n=3) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201215p2a01&n=4)
---
